## Source vs. Generated

<!-- What is hand-written vs. auto-generated vs. gitignored -->
- **Source:** `src/`, `tests/`
- **Generated:** `dist/`, `node_modules/`
- **Gitignored:** `.mema/`, `node_modules/`, `.env`

## Where to Find X

<!-- Quick-reference for navigating the codebase -->
